description: A designed child-safety infographic from DHS's 'Know2Protect' (iGuardians/HSI) campaign, part of a 'TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT' series, with a summery beach theme. The upper portion is a bright blue 'pool/beach' scene with cut-out illustrated objects scattered around an orange banner reading 'TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT': a camera, a red-and-white life ring, a green popsicle, red sunglasses, a watermelon slice, butterflies, clouds and a sun. The lower portion is darker blue with large white text 'TIP 10' and an orange 'Do not' heading, followed by white body text: 'delete messages, images or videos from predators and do not forward any sexually explicit images or videos. Save usernames, screenshots and images or videos as evidence for law enforcement to collect directly from the device.' At the bottom are the DHS seal and the 'know2protect' logo with the tagline 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation.'
notable_text: TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT; TIP 10; Do not delete messages, images or videos from predators and do not forward any sexually explicit images or videos. Save usernames, screenshots and images or videos as evidence for law enforcement to collect directly from the device.; know2protect - Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation
